abilities.chainLimit: null or {maxTriggers: positive integer}; enforced per runtimeKey and scopeKey

presentationKey.note: Not explicitly rejected, but the current normalizer drops it; presentation integration is unavailable.
Not explicitly rejected, but the current normalizer drops it; presentation integration is unavailable.

$.allowedSlots.validation: all entries must be combatant or support

$.assets.portrait.runtime: compiled to hashed portrait URL only

$.displayName.validation: normalization-required; runtime registry rejects missing name

$.id.validation: must equal manifest and folder id

$.shortName.validation: normalization-required; runtime registry rejects missing shortName

$.tags.runtime: metadata and HAS_TAG source tags where supplied
$.tags.validation: normalization-required; runtime registry requires a non-empty array

portraitPolicy.fallback: shared CSS portrait fallback when omitted or load fails

statsPolicy.rounding: Math.round after match-size, chain, and frenzy calculation

constraints: commands only; no direct battle mutation
file system/network/database/environment/timers are forbidden by trusted-code contract, not sandbox enforcement
customHandlers.presentationEvents: Type field exists, but BattleEffectEngine currently ignores returned presentationEvents.

ADD_SHIELD.note: scope currently normalizes only to chain_step.

damage.finalAmount.note: Validator accepts this path, but no emitted support trigger currently supplies finalAmount.

idRules.characterId: must equal package and folder ID

policies.copyAndConversionPrimitives: metadata only; no package Effect primitive
policies.copyPolicyRuntimeUse: validated then dropped by the normalizer; no copy primitive currently exists
policies.recursionPolicyRuntimeUse: validated then dropped; hard engine safety rules apply

lifecycle.ABILITY: namespaced by the executing ability and cleared with battle runtime
lifecycle.CHAIN: cleared when the current chain completes
lifecycle.STATUS: readable during STATUS_REMOVED dispatch, then cleared with the status

runtimeValues.snapshot: deterministically sorted and restored; missing legacy field becomes an empty store

statuses.snapshot: StatusSnapshot stores id, source/target, stackCount, expiresAt and visibility.
